description_text: Features: Universal Lower Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit PU Spoiler Black Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Universal custom fitment; Professional installation is required Specifications: Material: ABS Plastic Color: Gloss Black Dimension: 33.58" x 5.28" (inches) Fitment Type: Performance/Custom Surface Finish:Gloss Black Placement on Vehicle: Rear Package Included: 1x Rear Bumper Spoiler (adhesive tape are included) Notice: - Please allow 1-3CM differs due to manual measurement. - Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your understanding.
